data.title: Gemini Space Station (GEMI) shares drop 13% after surprise pullback and executive departures following IPO.
data.description: Investors who incurred losses in Gemini Space Station (NASDAQ: GEMI) are advised to reach out to Hagens Berman following the company's disclosure on February 17, 2026. Share prices plummeted by approximately 13% after the surprising revelation of three senior executive departures.

data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund held a webinar on Feb 20, 2026, presenting Q4 2025 results and new unit issuance.
data.description: Baltic Horizon conducted an investor webinar on February 20, 2026, during which fund manager Tarmo Karotam presented the Q4 2025 results and announced the issuance of new units.

data.title: VCI Global forms ROBODAX to unify robotics automation and digital infrastructure, boosting scalability in AI deployment.
data.description: Strategic Platform Initiative sets company up for scalable commercial deployment within AI-driven physical-to-digital ecosystem. This move aims to capitalize on the growing trend towards digital transformation. The initiative places the company in a strong position to expand its market presence and leverage the advantages of AI technology. The focus is on achieving scalability and driving growth within the digital ecosystem. Key metrics include cost efficiency, operational effectiveness, and enhanced customer experience. With this strategic move, the company is geared towards seizing opportunities in the AI space.

data.title: Meta plans to invest $65 million to support AI-friendly state politicians, starting in Texas and Illinois. This is Meta's largest election-related expenditure to date. They are launching two new super PACs to counteract potential legislative threats to AI development.
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is set to invest $65 million in 2026 to endorse state politicians who advocate for the artificial intelligence (AI) sector. The campaign will debut in Texas and Illinois this week, marking the company's most substantial election-related spending so far. With potential regulatory challenges looming over the AI industry, Meta is ramping up its political engagement to safeguard against any laws that may impede AI progress. To bolster this effort, Meta has introduced two new super political action committees (PACs): Forge the Future Project and Making Our Tomorrow, which will back Republicans and Democrats, respectively. These PACs complement the two existing ones, bringing the total initial budget to $65 million.

data.title: Peak Rock Capital affiliate to acquire UL Solutions' Employee Health and Safety software business in agreement on Feb. 20, 2026.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on February 20, 2026, it was announced that an affiliate of Peak Rock Capital, a prominent private investment firm specializing in the middle-market, has finalized a deal to purchase the Employee Health and Safety (EHS) software division of UL. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, with exact figures undisclosed at this time.

data.title: Aramore gains national recognition for pioneering NAD+ innovation in beauty. Beverly, Mass, Feb. 20, 2026.
data.description: A skincare company based in Beverly, Massachusetts called Aramore has been receiving national recognition for their innovative approach to skincare by incorporating cellular longevity research into their products. Known as a science-first brand, Aramore is changing the way people perceive aging and skincare. This news was announced on February 20, 2026, and signifies a significant shift in the beauty industry towards more research-based products.

data.title: United Airlines stock is up in premarket trading after 6% decline due to rising fuel costs. Stock is 0.6% above 20-day SMA and 5.9% above 100-day SMA, showing long-term strength. Profitability affected by high oil prices. Sentiment stabilizing, but concerns remain.
data.description: Shares of United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UAL) are slightly up in premarket trading on Friday as they aim to recover from a previous session drop where the stock decreased by almost 6% due to concerns over increasing fuel costs. This decline was attributed to a surge in crude oil prices to six-month highs, reigniting fears of margin pressure in the airline sector among investors. Fuel expenses are a significant variable cost for airlines, and the continuous rise in oil prices can negatively impact profitability despite an uptick in travel demand. However, there seems to be a stabilization in market sentiment leading into Friday. Currently, UAL stock is trading 0.6% above its 20-day SMA and 5.9% above its 100-day SMA, indicating strength in the long term. Over the past year, shares have risen by 7.38% and are closer to their 52-week highs than lows. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 48.71, signaling a neutral position. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pivot Bio CEO to speak at Bank of America 2026 Conference on Feb 25-26. Shared success with 4 product launches in 2025.
data.description: Pivot Bio, a top agtech company, is set to participate in the Bank of America 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 25-26, 2026. The event will feature Chris Abbott, the CEO, who will speak on the Bioactives/Biologicals Panel on February 25. Abbott will discuss the company’s achievements in the United States, which include launching four products in 2025, a record-breaking number in its 15-year history. data.title: Blue Owl Private Credit's recent changes resulted in sharp drop in private lenders' shares, raising concerns about future challenges.
data.description: Significant drops in the stock prices of private lenders have occurred following changes made by a major fund in terms of investor fund withdrawal. This has raised concerns about the possibility of further financial issues in the future.

data.title: Upstart partners with Wafra on $200M auto finance agreement. AI lending marketplace expands with new commitment.
data.description: Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST), a renowned AI lending marketplace based in SAN MATEO, California, has revealed a significant development. They have secured a forward-flow commitment from Wafra, a prominent global alternative investment manager located in New York. Wafra has agreed to acquire assets worth up to $200 million that are originated through Upstart's auto finance platform. This collaboration marks a strategic move for both parties, showcasing the growing interest in leveraging AI within the lending sector.

data.title: Jessica M. Cicali appointed Senior VP, General Counsel & Secretary at Armstrong World Industries.
data.description: Armstrong World Industries, Inc., a prominent company on the NYSE with the ticker symbol AWI, headquartered in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, specializes in creating cutting-edge interior and exterior architectural products such as ceilings, specialty walls, and exterior metal solutions. Recently, the company disclosed the appointment of Jessica M. Cicali as the senior vice president, General Counsel, and secretary, starting from April 1. Apart from overseeing legal matters, Cicali will also take charge of spearheading the company's sustainability and government relations initiatives.

data.title: Bitcoin faces potential 84% crash if it falls below $50K, warns economist Peter Schiff.
data.description: Renowned economist Peter Schiff has raised concerns about Bitcoin's recent decline, suggesting that the digital currency could face a significant downturn if crucial support levels are breached. Schiff has highlighted the importance of the $50,000 mark, warning that a fall below this point could lead to a more substantial correction, possibly pushing Bitcoin to as low as $20,000. This potential drop of 84% from its peak has not been observed in current market conditions. Schiff's cautionary statement comes amid Bitcoin's struggles to recover its upward momentum, signaling a period of uncertainty for the cryptocurrency.
